headline: Barron's Latest Picks And Pans: Apple, Coupang, GameStop, Uber, Walker & Dunlop And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story discusses how the U.S. economy could soar as the pandemic fades.
	Other featured articles discuss why big pharmaceutical stocks are cheap, the outlook for the aerospace industry and what comes next for three meme stocks.

headline: US Transportation Regulator Singles Out Tesla In Calling For Tighter Autonomous Driving Rules
summary: The US National Transportation Safety Board has asked the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration to be stricter in its regulations on autonomous driving, especially with Tesla.

headline: Last Week's Notable Insider Buys: News Corp, Microsoft, Snowflake, Walmart And More
summary:
Insider buying can be an encouraging signal for potential investors, especially when markets are near all-time highs.
	A media mogul was among the insiders making purchases this week.
	Some insiders were buying shares as others were selling them.

headline: Investor Sues Elon Musk, Tesla Board Over 'Erratic' Tweeting, Alleging Violation Of SEC Settlement
summary: A Tesla investor sued Elon Musk and the company board, saying the CEO's "erratic" tweets violate a settlement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Apple, Lemonade, Sundial, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The week's bullish calls included electric vehicle makers and the king of e-commerce.
	Some so-called meme stocks highlight the bearish calls that were seen.

headline: Should Jack Dorsey Be Running Twitter And Square At The Same Time?
summary: Every week, Benzinga conducts a survey to collect sentiment on what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.

headline: US Box Office Sales On Pace To Rebound... To 1982 Levels
summary: Movie theaters in the U.S. are on pace to hit as high as $6 billion in sales this year, but that still would only be the same level as in 1982, adjusted for inflation, Bloomberg reported.

headline: Tesla Adjusts Production Processes to Meet China Capacity Growth; Changes Focus on Spare-part Production in Tesla's Shanghai Factory
The 'Boiler Room' Stock Pitch Recap: Nautilus, Uber, Lamar Advertising And More
summary:
Every Friday, at 3 p.m. ET, Ritholtz Wealth Management CEO Josh Brown and Benzinga CEO Jason Raznick host "The Boiler Room," a Clubhouse audio chat where listeners can pitch their favorite stock.

Here are this week's pitches.

headline: 7 ARKK Stocks With Technical Support And Upside Potential
summary: The ARK Innovation ETF (NYSE: ARKK) had another rough morning on Friday as its brutal month continues.
